scripts.build:js: vite build && esbuild --bundle --minify --target=es6 --outfile=src-tauri/injection/postinject_min.js src-tauri/injection/postinject.ts && esbuild --bundle --minify --target=es6 --outfile=src-tauri/injection/preinject_min.js src-tauri/injection/preinject.ts
scripts.build:updater: cd updater && cargo build --release && cd .. && cp updater/target/release/updater src-tauri/updater
scripts.test:security: node --test tests/tauri-security.test.mjs tests/tauri-opener.test.mjs tests/tauri-permissions.test.mjs tests/plugin-security.test.mjs tests/rtc-diagnostics.test.mjs tests/linux-screen-share.test.mjs
scripts.test:release: pnpm typecheck:injection && pnpm lint && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:release-gate && pnpm test:rust
scripts.codefix: pnpm format && pnpm clippy && pnpm lint --fix
